candidates.title: LinkedIn's war on AI slop is not just a policy update—it is an admission that the platform lost control of its feed
candidates.content: LinkedIn's war on AI slop is not just a policy update—it is an admission that the platform lost control of its feed
candidates.description:
Linkedin is cracking down on AI-generated junk content it calls "AI slop." In early tests, the platform says it correctly flagged generic posts 94 percent of the time. The irony: parent company Microsoft has been actively pushing AI use on LinkedIn itself.
